acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler A-Tune SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The A-Tune team is responsible for exploration of optimization technologies and AI-assisted performance analysis. The SIG has 22 core members and maintains 64 repositories in the AI and Machine Learning domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler A-Tune SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler A-Tune SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at a-tune@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler A-Tune SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler A-Tune SIG maintains 64 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/A-Tune.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler A-Tune SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler A-Tune SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Donghui Chen, HuBin95, yangyongguang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
